Shift2: ยุทธนา+พี่โย่ง
Name: NT_IV
Detail:
The ENTRY TABLE inverter generated the same alarm as previously reported.

HMI Alarm:
ENTRY TABLE INVERTER FAULT ALARM (NT_IV_FAULT_ALM)
INV: Port5 Comm Loss

As a result, the washing machine rollers stopped operating.

Engineering inspected the inverter and found the issue similar to the previous event on 8–10 Jan 2026.

After removing the Analog Card (Port5) and performing cleaning with air blow, the inverter communication was restored and the machine returned to normal operation.
Detail 2:
ไฟฟ้ากะ (พี่เอฟ)
ถอดการ์ด port5 analog ออกมา เอาลมเป่า cleaning
กลับมาใช้งานได้
